## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] Module is idempotent (re-running produces no changes)
- [ ] `check_mode` supported
- [ ] No sensitive data in logs or output (`no_log=True`)
- [ ] `DOCUMENTATION` and `EXAMPLES` updated
- [ ] `README.md` updated (if adding a module)
